endpoints.name: GET /v2/Trunking/Countries
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/Trunking/Countries/{IsoCountry}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{ISOCOUNTRY}} with a real isocountry.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/Trunking/Numbers/{DestinationNumber}
endpoints.description: Fetch pricing information for a specific destination and, optionally, origination phone number.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{DESTINATIONNUMBER}} with a real destinationnumber.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/Voice/Countries
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/Voice/Countries/{IsoCountry}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{ISOCOUNTRY}} with a real isocountry.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/Voice/Numbers/{DestinationNumber}
endpoints.description: Fetch pricing information for a specific destination and, optionally, origination phone number.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{DESTINATIONNUMBER}} with a real destinationnumber.
